title: Booking Movie Tickets 订电影票

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: I want to book two tickets for the seven-thirty show of Action Hero tonight.
lines.trans: 我想订今晚七点半《Action Hero》的两张票。

lines.speaker: App
lines.line: Searching for showtimes. The seven-thirty show is available at City Center Cinema.
lines.trans: 正在搜索场次。七点半的场次在市中心影院还有票。

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: Are there any good seats left? I prefer the middle of the theater.
lines.trans: 还有好座位吗？我喜欢坐影厅中间。

lines.speaker: App
lines.line: Rows eight to ten have available seats. Row nine, seats five and six are in the center.
lines.trans: 第八到十排还有座位。第九排五号、六号在正中间。

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: Those sound perfect. How much is the total for two tickets?
lines.trans: 听起来很完美。两张票一共多少钱？

lines.speaker: App
lines.line: Each ticket is fifteen dollars. The total is thirty dollars. Would you like to add popcorn and drinks?
lines.trans: 每张票15美元。一共30美元。您要加爆米花和饮料吗？

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: No, just the tickets. I will pay with my saved credit card.
lines.trans: 不用，只要票。我用已保存的信用卡付款。

lines.speaker: App
lines.line: Payment successful. Your QR code tickets are ready. Please show them at the entrance.
lines.trans: 付款成功。您的二维码电影票已生成。请在入口处出示。

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: Can I get a refund if I cannot make it tonight?
lines.trans: 如果我今晚去不了，能退票吗？

lines.speaker: App
lines.line: Yes, you can get a full refund if you cancel at least one hour before the show starts.
lines.trans: 可以，如果您在电影开场前至少一小时取消，可获得全额退款。
